episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein survivors testify
episodes.description: Survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's crimes testified at an unofficial field hearing in Florida today.

episodes.title: ‘Dances With Wolves’ actor Nathan Chasing Horse sentenced to life in prison for sexual assault
episodes.description: A Nevada judge sentenced “Dances With Wolves” actor Nathan Chasing Horse on Monday to life in prison for sexually assaulting Indigenous women and girls.

episodes.title: Gates Foundation launching an investigation into its ties to Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description: The foundation says it has commissioned an external review to examine past engagement with Epstein.

episodes.title: First Lady Melania Trump gives statement, denies ties to Epstein
episodes.description: First Lady Melania Trump held a rare public news conference Thursday at the White House denying any link to Jeffrey Epstein, calling for an end to what she described as 'lies.'

episodes.title: Press conference for Epstein survivors
episodes.description: Several House Democrats invited Epstein survivors to be their guests at tonight's State of the Union Address.

episodes.title: Recent Epstein files release drawing attention all over the world
episodes.description: The scandal forcing Britain's Prime Minister to answer tough questions about his leadership.
